description: Next.js vendor update for @vercel/og - compiled types (ui) + package.json (config)
rationale: Call-graph analysis: compiled .d.ts type definitions and package.json/pnpm-lock.yaml have no function call relationships. Type declaration files are generated artifacts with no import edges to package manifests. 3+ disconnected components = ERROR.
notes: Previously warning (ui+config = 2 domains). Call-graph analysis is stricter here: compiled type definitions and package config files have no call-graph edges connecting them, resulting in multiple disconnected components.
